method: skill-bridge-review workflow, 18 agents — 3 finder angles (correctness, security/cross-platform, integration-claim verification) x 8 candidates + per-finding adversarial verification
summary: 15 confirmed findings. 8 fixed in code, 4 documented as known limitations, 2 are INFO confirming the core mechanism works, 1 plausible deferred.
mechanism_confirmed: INFO: `--add-dir <bridge>` makes the bundled loader scan `<bridge>/.claude/skills` (traced cli.js: addDir -> additionalDirectoriesForClaudeMd -> skill scan). Bridge design correct.
INFO: the bundled per-dir scanner follows symlinked `<name>` entries (isSymbolicLink branch) and reads SKILL.md through the link — so symlinked foreign skills ARE discovered.

fixed.title: Silent symlink-failure drops
fixed.fix: materializeSkillBridge records skipped:[{name,code}] instead of swallowing; setupSkillBridge logs 'N could not be linked' and 'found but none linked' (covers Windows EPERM).

fixed.title: Symlink-following with no containment (arbitrary-dir grant)
fixed.fix: discoverForeignSkills uses lstatSync; a symlinked entry whose realpath escapes the scanned root is skipped (prevents `.codex/skills/x -> ~/.ssh` exposure).

fixed.title: Case-only-different names collide silently on case-insensitive FS
fixed.fix: planSkillBridge de-dups on name.toLowerCase(); the loser becomes a LOGGED shadow instead of a swallowed EEXIST.

fixed.title: Orphaned temp dir when all symlinks fail
fixed.fix: materializeSkillBridge rmSync's the temp dir and returns bridgeDir:null when linked.length===0.

fixed.title: Relative ANYMODEL_SKILL_ROOTS → broken symlink reported as success
fixed.fix: resolveForeignSkillRoots resolves relative entries to absolute against cwd.

fixed.title: Whole bridge no-ops on Windows (symlink privilege)
fixed.fix: LINK_TYPE = win32 ? 'junction' : 'dir' (junctions need no privilege); residual failures now surface via skipped.

fixed.title: Cleanup misses spawn 'error' / SIGTERM
fixed.fix: Added clientChild.on('error') + process SIGTERM cleanup at both spawn sites.

fixed.title: Root de-dup uses raw strings, not realpath
fixed.fix: discoverForeignSkills canonicalizes each root with realpathSync before the seen-set check.

documented_limitations.title: Bridge bypasses the client's gitignore skip for foreign skills
documented_limitations.note: The client skips gitignored skill dirs (e.g. node_modules). The bridge does not replicate git check-ignore. Acceptable: foreign roots (.agents/.codex/.gemini) are user-curated skill dirs, not dependency trees. Noted in spec limitations.

documented_limitations.title: planSkillBridge dedups by name; client dedups by realpath
documented_limitations.note: If two roots symlink the same physical skill dir, the bridge links it once by name and the client's realpath dedup absorbs the rest. No functional bug.

documented_limitations.title: Enterprise policy may suppress bridged skills
documented_limitations.note: An enterprise strictPluginOnlyCustomization / restricted allowedSettingSources policy can suppress --add-dir skills; AnyModel cannot override it. Noted as a limitation.

documented_limitations.title: $HOME-scope foreign skills loaded with no per-project opt-in
documented_limitations.note: Consistent with Claude Code's own user-scope (~/.claude/skills) behavior. ANYMODEL_SKILL_ROOTS allows override; contributing roots are visible via the discovery log. Kept by design.

verification.skill_bridge_tests: 12/12 pass (incl. containment, case-collision, relative-root, all-fail skipped+cleanup, real-symlink integration, cli glue)
